home.title: Welcome to Finnish Week
home.subtitle: Discover the taste of Nordic cuisine
home.aboutText:
Global Kitchen is your journey around the world through flavor.Every week, our restaurant highlights the cuisine of a new country and offers a wide selection of authentic dishes — from traditional favorites to modern interpretations.Here you can book a table, explore our restaurant events, join workshops, and enjoy themed evenings.

Registered users unlock even more features: manage their own events and reservations, view and save the Recipe of the Day, and enjoy a convenient personal profile.Global Kitchen — bringing the world of flavors to your table.
home.heroFinnishSubtitle: Discover the wholesome flavors of Nordic cuisine
home.heroFinnishDescription: Experience the purity and seasonality of Finnish cuisine. From fresh salmon to hearty reindeer stew, our Finnish week celebrates the best of Nordic traditions.
home.heroFinnishStory: Finnish cuisine is deeply connected to nature and seasons. Fresh ingredients, sustainable practices, and simple yet elegant preparation are at the heart of this culinary tradition.
home.heroIraqiSubtitle: Journey through rich and aromatic Middle Eastern flavors
home.heroIraqiDescription: Immerse yourself in the rich culinary heritage of Iraq. Bold spices, aromatic herbs, and centuries-old recipes create an unforgettable dining experience.
home.heroIraqiStory: Iraqi cuisine is one of the oldest in the world, with recipes passed down through generations. Each dish tells a story of tradition, family, and cultural pride.
home.heroTurkishSubtitle: Savor bold and flavorful Turkish delights
home.heroTurkishDescription: Turkish cuisine bridges East and West with its bold flavors and diverse influences. From succulent kebabs to delicate mezze, taste the essence of Turkish hospitality.
home.heroTurkishStory: Turkish food is celebrated worldwide for its quality ingredients and masterful preparation. Every dish is crafted with passion and served with pride.
home.heroRussianSubtitle: Experience hearty and traditional Russian comfort food
home.heroRussianDescription: Russian cuisine reflects the soul of a vast nation. Hearty, warming, and deeply satisfying, every meal is a celebration of tradition and community.
home.heroRussianStory: Russian food is born from harsh winters and abundant harvests. Simple yet nourishing, these dishes warm both body and heart.
home.heroUkrainianSubtitle: Taste the vibrant and rich traditions of Ukraine
home.heroUkrainianDescription: Ukrainian cuisine is a vibrant tapestry of flavors, colors, and warmth. From traditional varenyky to soul-warming borsch, experience authentic Ukrainian hospitality.
home.heroUkrainianStory: Ukrainian food represents centuries of agricultural tradition and cultural pride. Each recipe carries stories of family gatherings and festive celebrations.

1.name: Lohikeitto
1.description: Traditional Finnish salmon soup made with fresh salmon, potatoes, carrots, and cream. A comforting and hearty dish that warms you from the inside out.

2.name: Poronkäristys
2.description: Tender reindeer meat slowly cooked with potatoes and onions. A classic Finnish dish showcasing the rich flavors of Nordic game meat.

3.name: Karjalanpaisti
3.description: Karelian stew made with beef, pork, and potatoes, slow-cooked to perfection. A traditional Finnish comfort food with deep, rich flavors.

4.name: Kalakukko
4.description: Traditional Finnish fish pie baked in rye bread dough. A unique combination of fresh fish, pork, and onions wrapped in crispy bread.

5.name: Leipäjuusto
5.description: Finnish squeaky cheese, traditionally served with cloudberry jam. A unique cheese that makes a squeaking sound when you bite into it.

6.name: Mustikkapiirakka
6.description: Finnish blueberry pie with a buttery crust and fresh blueberry filling. A classic Finnish dessert celebrating the bounty of Nordic berries.

7.name: Salmiakki
7.description: Finnish salty licorice, a uniquely Nordic treat with a distinctive salty-sweet flavor that divides opinions worldwide.

8.name: Kaalilaatikko
8.description: Finnish cabbage casserole made with cabbage, ground meat, and rice. A comforting baked dish that's perfect for cold winter days.

9.name: Hernekeitto
9.description: Finnish pea soup traditionally served with ham and mustard. A thick, hearty soup that's a staple of Finnish cuisine.

10.name: Lihapullat
10.description: Finnish meatballs served with cream sauce and potatoes. Tender meatballs in a rich, creamy gravy - comfort food at its finest.

11.name: Silli
11.description: Pickled herring, a traditional Finnish appetizer. Fresh herring fillets marinated in vinegar with onions and spices.

12.name: Graavilohi
12.description: Gravadlax - cured salmon with dill and mustard sauce. Fresh salmon cured in salt, sugar, and dill, served with a tangy mustard cream sauce.

13.name: Kermaperunat
13.description: Creamed potatoes, a classic Finnish side dish. Mashed potatoes enriched with cream and butter for ultimate comfort.

14.name: Puolukkahillo
14.description: Lingonberry jam, the perfect accompaniment to Finnish dishes. Tart and sweet berries cooked down into a versatile jam.

15.name: Kaurapuuro
15.description: Finnish oatmeal porridge, often served with milk and berries. A simple, nourishing breakfast that's been sustaining Finns for generations.

16.name: Ruisleipä
16.description: Dark rye bread, the cornerstone of Finnish cuisine. Dense, flavorful bread that's perfect for sandwiches or as an accompaniment to meals.

17.name: Simppu
17.description: Finnish cinnamon buns, soft and fluffy with cinnamon sugar filling. A beloved pastry that's perfect with coffee.

18.name: Mämmi
18.description: Traditional Finnish Easter pudding made from malt and rye flour. A unique, sweet pudding that's a Finnish Easter tradition.

19.name: Vispipuuro
19.description: Finnish semolina pudding topped with berry sauce. A creamy, comforting dessert that's perfect for chilly evenings.

20.name: Lohisoppa
20.description: Creamy salmon soup with potatoes and vegetables. A lighter version of the traditional lohikeitto, perfect for lunch or dinner.

21.name: Borscht
21.description: Traditional Russian beet soup with cabbage, potatoes, and beef. A vibrant, hearty soup that's both nourishing and flavorful.

22.name: Pelmeni
22.description: Russian dumplings filled with meat, served with sour cream. Handmade dumplings that are a staple of Russian home cooking.

23.name: Beef Stroganoff
23.description: Tender beef strips in creamy mushroom sauce served over noodles. A classic Russian dish that's elegant yet comforting.

24.name: Blini
24.description: Russian pancakes served with caviar, sour cream, or jam. Thin, delicate pancakes that can be sweet or savory.

25.name: Shorpo
25.description: Traditional Kyrgyz/Russian meat soup with potatoes and onions. A hearty broth-based soup perfect for cold days.

26.name: Plov
26.description: Central Asian rice dish with lamb, carrots, and onions. Fragrant rice cooked with tender meat and spices.

27.name: Lagman
27.description: Hand-pulled noodles with meat and vegetables in rich broth. A substantial noodle dish that's perfect for sharing.

28.name: Beshbarmak
28.description: Boiled meat (usually lamb) served with flat noodles. A traditional Tatar dish representing hospitality and celebration.

29.name: Achichuk
29.description: Cold soup made with tomato paste, onions, and bread. A refreshing summer soup that's surprisingly satisfying.

30.name: Dograma
30.description: Cold soup with bread, onions, and herbs. A traditional Kyrgyz soup that's perfect for hot summer days.

31.name: Kuurdak
31.description: Fried meat (lamb or beef) with onions. A simple yet flavorful dish cooked over an open fire.

32.name: Lepeshki
32.description: Central Asian flatbread, perfect with any meal. Soft, fluffy bread that's essential for scooping up sauces and stews.

33.name: Non
33.description: Central Asian flatbread baked in a clay oven. Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside - perfect with any dish.

34.name: Halva
34.description: Sweet confection made from sunflower seeds. A dense, sweet treat that's popular throughout Central Asia.

35.name: Chak-Chak
35.description: Fried dough with honey, a Tatar dessert. Crispy fried dough coated in honey - a sweet celebration of Tatar cuisine.

36.name: Pahlava
36.description: Layered pastry with nuts and honey syrup. A rich, decadent dessert that's perfect for special occasions.

37.name: Katyk
37.description: Fermented milk drink, similar to yogurt. A refreshing, probiotic-rich drink that's both healthy and delicious.

38.name: Kumiz
38.description: Fermented mare's milk, a traditional Kyrgyz drink. An acquired taste with health benefits, traditional among nomadic peoples.

39.name: Mastava
39.description: Thick soup with meat, potatoes, and herbs. A hearty Kyrgyz soup that's perfect for cold weather.

40.name: Samsa
40.description: Pastries filled with meat and onions. Flaky pastries that are perfect as appetizers or snacks.

41.name: Borshch
41.description: Ukrainian beet soup with cabbage, beans, and pork. A vibrant, flavorful soup that's the heart of Ukrainian cuisine.

42.name: Varenyky
42.description: Ukrainian dumplings filled with potatoes, cheese, or fruit. Versatile dumplings that can be sweet or savory.

43.name: Holubtsi
43.description: Cabbage rolls filled with meat and rice in tomato sauce. Tender cabbage leaves stuffed with a flavorful meat mixture.

44.name: Syrnyky
44.description: Ukrainian cheese pancakes served with sour cream. Sweet, cheesy pancakes that make a perfect breakfast or dessert.

45.name: Deruny
45.description: Ukrainian potato pancakes, crispy and golden. Grated potatoes fried until crispy - a beloved comfort food.

46.name: Kachorovka
46.description: Ukrainian potato casserole with meat and onions. A layered casserole that's hearty and satisfying.

47.name: Zrazy
47.description: Ukrainian meat rolls filled with vegetables or mushrooms. Thin meat cutlets rolled around a savory filling.

48.name: Mlyntsi
48.description: Ukrainian crepes that can be sweet or savory. Thin, delicate pancakes perfect for any filling.

49.name: Kotlety
49.description: Ukrainian meat patties, juicy and flavorful. Classic meat patties that are tender and full of flavor.

50.name: Kholodets
50.description: Ukrainian meat jelly, a festive dish. A traditional aspic that's served during celebrations.

51.name: Tvorizhna Pasca
51.description: Ukrainian Easter cheese bread. A sweet, symbolic bread that's essential for Easter celebrations.

52.name: Makivnyk
52.description: Ukrainian poppy seed roll, a sweet pastry. Rich pastry filled with poppy seeds and honey.

53.name: Uzvar
53.description: Ukrainian dried fruit compote. A refreshing drink made from dried fruits, perfect for any meal.

54.name: Kvas
54.description: Traditional Ukrainian fermented bread drink. A slightly sour, refreshing beverage with ancient roots.

55.name: Salad Olivie
55.description: Ukrainian potato salad with vegetables and meat. A creamy salad that's a staple at celebrations.

56.name: Vinaigrette
56.description: Ukrainian beet salad with vegetables. A colorful, healthy salad that's both nutritious and delicious.

57.name: Baked Milk
57.description: Ukrainian slow-baked milk, rich and caramelized. A unique dairy product with a distinctive flavor.

58.name: Goroshek
58.description: Ukrainian green pea snack. A simple, addictive snack that's perfect for munching.

59.name: Kefir
59.description: Ukrainian fermented milk drink. A probiotic-rich drink that's both healthy and refreshing.

60.name: Ryazhenka
60.description: Ukrainian baked fermented milk. A thick, creamy yogurt-like drink with a caramelized flavor.

61.name: Mercimek Corbasi
61.description: Turkish red lentil soup with spices and lemon. A comforting, nutritious soup that's perfect for any season.

62.name: Iskender Kebab
62.description: Döner kebab with tomato sauce and yogurt. Thinly sliced meat served over bread with rich tomato sauce.

63.name: Baklava
63.description: Layered pastry with nuts and honey syrup. A rich, sweet pastry that's the epitome of Turkish dessert.

64.name: Doner Kebab
64.description: Turkish rotating spit kebab with vegetables. Juicy, seasoned meat that's been slowly roasted.

65.name: Kofte
65.description: Turkish meatballs with spices and herbs. Flavorful meatballs that are juicy and aromatic.

66.name: Lahmacun
66.description: Turkish pizza with minced meat and vegetables. Thin, crispy dough topped with spiced meat and onions.

67.name: Pide
67.description: Turkish boat-shaped bread with various toppings. Similar to pizza but with a unique Turkish twist.

68.name: Menemen
68.description: Turkish scrambled eggs with tomatoes and peppers. A flavorful breakfast dish that's spicy and satisfying.

69.name: Simit
69.description: Turkish sesame bread rings. Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside - perfect for breakfast.

70.name: Pogaca
70.description: Turkish savory pastries filled with cheese or meat. Flaky pastries that are perfect for snacking.

71.name: Borek
71.description: Turkish pastry with spinach and cheese filling. Layers of thin pastry filled with savory ingredients.

72.name: Kumpir
72.description: Turkish baked potato with various toppings. A loaded baked potato that's a street food favorite.

73.name: Midye Dolma
73.description: Stuffed mussels with rice and spices. Fresh mussels filled with a flavorful rice mixture.

74.name: Hamsi
74.description: Turkish anchovies, often fried or grilled. Small, flavorful fish that are a Black Sea specialty.

75.name: Kisir
75.description: Turkish bulgur salad with tomatoes and herbs. A fresh, zesty salad that's perfect for summer.

76.name: Cacik
76.description: Turkish yogurt with cucumber and herbs. A refreshing dip or side dish that's cool and creamy.

77.name: Haydari
77.description: Turkish strained yogurt dip with herbs. A creamy, garlicky dip that's perfect with bread.

78.name: Humus
78.description: Turkish chickpea dip with tahini and lemon. Creamy, flavorful dip that's a staple in Turkish cuisine.

79.name: Patates Kizartmasi
79.description: Turkish french fries with various seasonings. Crispy fries that are a popular street food.

80.name: Kunefe
80.description: Turkish dessert with cheese and syrup. A warm, gooey dessert that's sweet and satisfying.

81.name: Jaajek
81.description: Iraqi chickpea stew with meat and spices. A hearty, flavorful stew that's perfect for sharing.

82.name: Zabiib
82.description: Iraqi rice pudding with raisins and nuts. A sweet, comforting dessert that's popular across the Middle East.

83.name: Fasolia
83.description: Iraqi green bean stew with meat and tomatoes. A simple, nourishing stew that's a Iraqi home cooking staple.

84.name: Kubba
84.description: Iraqi dumplings filled with meat and onions. Crispy on the outside, tender on the inside - a labor of love.

85.name: Tashrib
85.description: Iraqi bread soup with meat and vegetables. A comforting soup made with flatbread and rich broth.

86.name: Dolma
86.description: Iraqi stuffed vegetables with rice and meat. Vegetables stuffed with a flavorful rice and meat mixture.

87.name: Bamia
87.description: Iraqi okra stew with meat and tomatoes. Tender okra in a rich, spiced tomato sauce.

88.name: Makhlouta
88.description: Iraqi mixed bean stew with meat. A hearty stew with various beans and tender meat.

89.name: Margat Bamia
89.description: Iraqi okra and meat stew. A variation of bamia with a unique Iraqi twist.

90.name: Kubba Halab
90.description: Aleppo-style kubba with cheese filling. A special variation of kubba with cheese instead of meat.

91.name: Kubba Mosul
91.description: Mosul-style kubba with meat filling. The classic kubba that's beloved in Mosul.

92.name: Kubba Bil Sanabel
92.description: Pumpkin kubba, a sweet variation. A dessert kubba filled with sweetened pumpkin.

93.name: Harisa
93.description: Iraqi wheat porridge with meat. A thick, hearty dish that's perfect for cold weather.

94.name: Timman Bagilla
94.description: Iraqi eggplant with meat and tomatoes. Eggplant stewed with meat in a rich tomato sauce.

95.name: Timman Bandora
95.description: Iraqi tomato stew with meat. A simple tomato-based stew with tender meat.

96.name: Timman Khudra
96.description: Iraqi vegetable stew with meat. Mixed vegetables cooked with meat in a flavorful broth.

97.name: Timman Fasolia
97.description: Iraqi bean stew with meat. White beans cooked with meat and spices.

98.name: Timman Burghul
98.description: Iraqi bulgur stew with meat. Bulgur wheat cooked with meat and vegetables.

99.name: Timman Ruzz
99.description: Iraqi rice stew with meat. Rice cooked with meat and spices in a rich broth.

100.name: Timman Shamam
100.description: Iraqi fish stew. Fresh fish cooked in a flavorful tomato-based sauce.
